lines: Iteka Nagendaga Ndemerewe N’ibyaha Ntihagire Ikibasha Kumara Umubabaro
Ndashima Umusaraba Ndashima Ya Mva Nziza Ariko Cyane,Cyane Ndashima
Kugeza Ubwo Nageze Ahantu Heza Cyane Hangiriye Umumaro Ntazibagirwa
Iri N’itangiriro Ry’umunezero Wanjye Aha Niho Umutwaro  Wamvuye Ku
Ku Musaraba Mwiza Niho Umuntu Abonera Abagabo Batatu Bakamuhumuriza
Ku Musaraba Mwiza Niho Umuntu Abonera Urwandiko Rw’ijuru Rutar’urw’itorero
Umugabo Nta Bwenge Yagiye Nta Rwandiko Agira Ngo Azinjira Nk’ukw’abandi
Nukw’ageze Kw’irembo Bamubaza Urwandiko Rwa Katanga Ka Mbere Asanga
Mu Rubavu Rwa Yesu Havuyemo Amaraso Y’uruzi Rw’ubugingo Yoza Umutima

Gira Umwete Winjire Mu Maraso Ya Yesu Uzashiraho Inenge Mu Mutima
Wanduye
